phases.instrumentation: tracking every interaction — which docs surface, which get read, which sessions succeed
phases.lifecycle: automated maintenance — daily triage, weekly health, monthly deep clean
phases.activation: pushing knowledge to sessions — smarter search, brief tool, session hooks
phases.self-improvement: the brain proposes changes to itself, tests them, keeps or reverts

proposals.title: track every KB interaction
proposals.change: added hit_count and cite_count to every document. every search, every read, every session outcome — tracked.
proposals.impact: made noise visible — high-hit zero-cite docs became obvious candidates for cleanup

proposals.title: vault restructure — Obsidian canonical
proposals.change: moved from flat files to Obsidian vault as single source of truth. three tiers: _system, projects, archive.
proposals.impact: everything searchable, versionable, one place. CLAUDE.md became a thin bootloader

proposals.title: automated lifecycle engine
proposals.change: daily triage compacts 10+ sessions. weekly health audits reuse rate and gaps. monthly deep clean archives stale notes.
proposals.impact: 488 notes became 410 after first clean — same knowledge, less noise

proposals.title: kb_brief — proactive context loading
proposals.change: new tool assembles must-know lessons, recent fixes, active workflows, and warnings before every session.
proposals.impact: sessions stopped rediscovering known fixes. reuse rate jumped

proposals.title: document test-wiring patterns
proposals.change: captured recurring test setup patterns so sessions stop asking how to run tests.

proposals.title: recover compounding score regression
proposals.change: score dropped from 89% to 52%. root cause: metric plumbing bug — sessions weren't being tagged with outcomes.
proposals.impact: recovered to 88% after fixing the pipeline

proposals.title: reduce kb_read token cost
proposals.change: kb_read was consuming 52% of tool token budget. added truncation and summary modes.

proposals.title: fix kb_audit ID-ambiguity bug
proposals.change: audit tool confused vault_file_id with document_id. silently archived wrong notes.
proposals.impact: 3 mis-archived notes recovered. added ID validation to prevent recurrence

proposals.title: fix kb_compact mega-clustering
proposals.change: similarity threshold on 197 notes collapsed into 1 giant cluster instead of meaningful groups.
proposals.impact: needs sub-grouping logic — too aggressive at scale

proposals.title: escalate capture completeness
proposals.change: capture_completeness was 0% — sessions weren't saving outcomes. added hooks and reminders.
proposals.impact: improved to 20% but still below target. needs structural fix
